REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF REEF SHAFER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PLAINTIFFS NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT AND ACCOUNTING RELATED TO PARTITION IS IS DENIED UNDER CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 437 SUBDIVISION (C) PARAGRAPH (C). PLAINTIFFS DEMONSTRATE THAT THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WAIVER REMAINING, AS EVIDENCED BY THE DECLARATION OF SUZANNE ROMAINE, AND EXHIBIT A OF TARA MACOMBER'S DECLARATION. 2. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS. GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART. 3. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED UNDER CALIFORNIA EVIDENCE CODE 452(D). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Defendant Leave To File A Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Troung, Esq., 415-262-1200, appearing for Reef Shafer, Plaintiff

Tara Macomber, Esq., 415-323-0946, appearing for Suzanne Romaine, for Defendant

Argued. The Court stated that it wanted to hear from the defendant and counsel about what efforts if any were made to address this issue earlier. Ms. Macomber reported that her client was out of state and requested a continuance. Mr. Troung objected to this request.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SUZANNE ROMAINE's Motion For Order Granting Defendant Leave To File A Cross-Complaint is granted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-31-2019 Continued To Apr-06-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment And For Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment And Accounting Related To Partition
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Truong, 415.448.5000 for Plaintiff Reef Shafer.
Sil Liapos, 415.610.5591 for Defendant Suzanne Romaine.

Argued. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF REEF SHAFER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment And For Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment And Accounting Related To Partition is is DENIED under California Code of Civil Procedure section 437 subdivision (c) paragraph (c). Plaintiffs demonstrate that there is a triable issue of material fact regarding waiver remaining, as evidenced by the declaration of Suzanne Romaine, and Exhibit A of Tara Macomber's Declaration.

2. Plaintiff's evidentiary objections. GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART.

3. Request for judicial notice is GRANTED under California Evidence Code 452(d). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-01-2019 Continued To Dec-02-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Truong, 415.448.5000 for Plaintiff Reef Shafer.
Duzanne Romaine, 415.317.1701 Defendant on her own behalf.

Argued. Defendant claims that she was not prepery served and did not receive notice of the hearing until October 30, 2019. The Court states that the service was improper; Defendant's former attorney was served. The Court addresses the Defendants responses and orders that the Defendant mail her responses to Plaintiff's counsel by November 6, 2019. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF REEF SHAFER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions is continued to December 2, 2019. Both sides waive notice. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
